---
pagetitle: 專案 | Yueswater Blog
lang: zh-TW
description: "Anthony 做過的軟體專案，涵蓋全端 Web 應用、資料視覺化工具與社團管理系統。"
title: 專案
subtitle: 我做過的東西
search: false
repo-actions: false
listing:
  contents:
  - posts
  - "!index.qmd"
  - "!index-en.qmd"
  - "!posts/**/*-en.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 30
  feed: true
alternate-lang: "/projects/index-en.html"
---
